'''Imperial sonic blasters''' were [[Sonic blaster/Legends|sonic blasters]] used by [[Imperial officer/Legends|officers]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In use by [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]], these pistols were deadly at close range. Although it had a wide range, it had low power. That, coupled with the fact that these blasters had limited ammunition, limited them as support weapons. Nevertheless, they were extremely [[Death/Legends|deadly]] at close range and could kill or wound nearby troops.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Imperial sonic pistol appears in the [[Star Wars Battlefront (series)|''Star Wars: Battlefront'']] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] series as an Imperial-affiliated weapon.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'' {{1st}}
